conflict_type: Conflicts between Phrase Constraints and Style Constraints
seed_instruction: Send an email to a repair shop to check the status of a laptop repair.
org_constraint: The tone of the email must remain formal throughout.
new_constraint: The email must include the phrase "What's up with my laptop?"
instruction: Send an email to a repair shop to check the status of a laptop repair. The tone of the email must remain formal throughout. The email must include the phrase "What's up with my laptop?"
response:
Subject: Inquiry Regarding Repair Status – Laptop Serial Number: [Insert Serial Number]

Dear [Name of Repair Shop or "Customer Service Team"],

I am writing to formally request an update regarding the status of my laptop repair. The device was submitted to your facility on [Date of Submission] under the reference number [Insert Reference Number, if applicable].

Despite my previous inquiries, I have not yet received a confirmation of completion or an estimated timeline for the return of the unit. Given the current situation, I would appreciate it if you could provide a detailed status report at your earliest convenience.

Could you please clarify the current stage of the repair process? Specifically, I would like to know if the issue has been resolved or if there are any additional steps required from my end.

I would also appreciate a response to the following question: "What's up with my laptop?" Please ensure this inquiry is addressed directly in your reply.

I look forward to your prompt response and the resolution of this matter.

Sincerely,

[Your Full Name]
[Your Phone Number]
[Your Email Address]
